claim_policy.principle: Examples are probes into a general ability class, not the target by themselves.
claim_policy.level_a_scope: Deterministic file-backed regression evidence only. It does not prove live services, microphone, speaker, simulator execution, or robot behavior.
claim_policy.live_text_scope: Text enters the same Router and Agent interaction boundary used after ASR. Preview mode proves live interpretation and planning only; execute mode is required before claiming simulator execution.
claim_policy.failure_policy: A failed case requires a root-cause report naming the earliest wrong boundary before prompts or wording are changed.

ability_classes.title: Robust Intent Understanding
ability_classes.general_rule: Chromie should preserve ordinary human meaning across discourse markers, short fragments, ASR-like noise, Chinese and English input, and follow-up context.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A discourse marker must not become locomotion.
Chinese chat text with body-like words must not be forced into an unrelated action.
ASR-like near words must not select a weakly related walking skill.
Noisy or uncertain hearing should remain honest and clarifyable.
A low-confidence referential fragment must clarify instead of fabricating understanding.
A prior weather turn must not contaminate repeated physical-action interpretation.
The Chinese live-log walking request must not inherit a stale weather intent.
An inactive direct Chinese weather question must keep its grounded tool route when the addressedness reviewer falsely labels it unaddressed.

live_text_cases.description: ASR-style typo should be understood as a walking request when the live catalog supports walking.

ability_classes.title: Stable Capability Grounding
ability_classes.general_rule: When the live catalog contains an exact high-level ability, Chromie should ground the user meaning to that ability without relying on a fragile timeout-prone second chance.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A direct walk request should stay on the physical proposal path.
A walking request must not be repaired into a nod.
Unavailable or weak review output must not substitute a different body skill.
Mixed speech and body requests should keep each lane grounded.
An internally inconsistent stale weather route is semantically repaired to the exact walking affordance.
The same walking request remains grounded across repeated turns after a weather query.
The Chinese live-log walking request must not inherit a stale weather intent.

live_text_cases.description: Exact head nod request should ground to the catalog-backed nod skill.
Clean walking request should preserve duration and speed.

ability_classes.title: Natural Uncertainty Handling
ability_classes.general_rule: Ambiguous, underspecified, or perception-dependent requests should ask about the real uncertainty instead of leaking generic missing-skill or internal-policy speech.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: Unresolved location reference should not execute.
The interaction response should ask for needed context.
A daily-life ambiguous object request should clarify.
Unknown perception state should be acknowledged honestly.
Unknown robot state should not be fabricated.

live_text_cases.description: Ambiguous Chinese tool-like text should clarify the meaning, not report a missing physical skill.
A low-information fragment should clarify instead of becoming blink or another nearby skill.

ability_classes.title: Composable High-Level Action Planning
ability_classes.general_rule: Supported multi-step body requests should produce ordered high-level skills while preserving sequential execution and validation.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A compound request should keep each supported body action.
Follow-up status should remember the compound body request.
A short step plus nod is a representative multi-skill action.
Walking plus a visual cue should stay ordered.

live_text_cases.text: walk ahead at 0.2 speed for 10 seconds and then nod your head twice, then turn left
live_text_cases.description: Canonical live compound body request should preserve all ordered skills.

ability_classes.title: Truthful Embodied Speech
ability_classes.general_rule: Chromie speech should reflect proposal, confirmation, execution, refusal, cancellation, and provider evidence without claiming uncommitted or impossible work.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A physical request should not degrade into unrelated social fallback text.
Low-level control requests must be refused at the model-facing boundary.
Pending or prior motion status must be described truthfully.
Nearby people should keep movement speech cautious and conditional.
Chromie must not claim emergency sensing without evidence.
Self-description and capability inquiries stay grounded in the structured self model and supplied runtime capability evidence without executing actions.
Speech may coordinate a model-authored, evidence-bound auxiliary attention gesture without turning it into the user's main task.
Natural attention remains optional; the model can choose speech-only behavior instead of a repetitive fixed gesture.

ability_classes.title: Tool And Conversation Lane Discipline
ability_classes.general_rule: Conversation, memory, tool use, and body action should stay in the right lane, with validated arguments before any tool or skill claim.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A factual statement with weak motion-word overlap must stay in conversation and must not trigger physical action.
A factual question remains on a cognitive lane when quick routing is unavailable instead of falling through to catalog motion.
Weather intent should use the tool lane when available.
Unavailable tool support should be explained without fake lookup results.
A missing timer capability should not be treated as completed work.
Chromie should not claim playback support without a speaker/tool path.
Ordinary language tasks should remain conversational, not embodied.
A chat route cannot inherit physical authority from a stale active projection of earlier motion goals, even if a model tries to replay them.

ability_classes.title: Deterministic Safety Controls
ability_classes.general_rule: Stop, cancel, emergency, silence, and unusable-audio paths must not depend on model judgment.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A polite stop should still route through the deterministic interrupt path.
Cancellation language should close the pending task deterministically.
Denied confirmation must remain denied in follow-up state.
Socially phrased interruption should not wait for model permission.

ability_classes.title: Evidence Coverage And Claim Discipline
ability_classes.general_rule: Tests should prove the user-visible boundary being claimed and should retain enough trace detail to locate the earliest wrong component.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: A retained voice-log regression should remain a representative scenario, not a one-off phrase patch.
Truth reconciliation must be visible in metadata and final speech.
A revised proposal should supersede unsafe or wrong earlier action.
Compatibility adaptation should preserve refusal instead of hiding a blocked result.

ability_classes.title: Daily-Life Multi-Goal Coordination
ability_classes.general_rule: Chromie should keep independent daily-life goals separate, assign every effectful step to the correct goal, execute supported goals in order, answer conversational goals, and clarify or report unavailable goals without dropping or cross-authorizing another goal.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: Two supported social-motion goals keep exact sequential ownership.
An effectful goal and a conversational goal both survive one turn.
A safe independent action can proceed while a referential goal asks a specific clarification.
An unavailable manipulation goal does not suppress or impersonate a supported gesture.
Three goals preserve sequence, speech coverage, and motion confirmation.
Repeated identical skills retain distinct ordered identities and goal ownership.
The same ownership and sequencing contract holds for normal English phrasing.
Execute, respond, and clarify outcomes coexist without cross-goal leakage.
A stale multi-goal projection left by completed motion cannot cross-authorize new physical effects on a social turn.

live_text_cases.text: Look at me for two seconds, then blink twice.
live_text_cases.description: Live goal-driven planning should preserve two independently owned social-motion goals.
Live execution should preserve ordered gestures rather than collapsing them.

live_text_cases.text: Walk forward for one second, then blink twice.
live_text_cases.description: A bounded locomotion goal and a gesture goal should remain sequential and simulator-confirmed.

live_text_cases.text: Blink twice and tell me a short joke.
live_text_cases.description: A live mixed request should execute the body goal while also answering the conversational goal.

ability_classes.title: Evidence-Bound Cognitive Turn Closure
ability_classes.general_rule: Every admitted effectful turn should preserve its identity through execution, retain completed, missing, failed, and cancelled outcomes, commit goal state, suppress stale speech, and emit at most one evidence-bound speech-only final while the turn remains current.

level_a_scenarios.rationale: An admitted multi-goal turn preserves identity, retains completed and missing outcomes, updates each goal, and emits one speech-only final.
A provider exception before terminal results closes every planned step as not_run without speaking internal failure text.
A completed result without a committed output schema retains terminal status but cannot expose its untrusted payload in final speech.
A newer turn suppresses stale final speech while retaining the completed outcome and updated goal state.
A deterministic stop cancels the active provider request, marks its queued sibling not_run, retains both outcomes, and emits no late final.
